#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Create clean BC Rich Warlock player sprites for Heavy Metal Nightmare.
Features proper Warlock guitar shape with sharp V-body, reverse headstock.
"""

from PIL import Image, ImageDraw

def create_warlock_guitar(draw, x, y, scale=1, angle=0, facing_right=True):
    """
    Draw a BC Rich Warlock guitar at position (x, y).
    The Warlock has:
    - Sharp V-shaped body with two distinct pointy horns
    - Upper horn points UP and LEFT (long and sharp)
    - Lower horn points DOWN and RIGHT (sharp, weapon-like)
    - Pinched waist between horns
    - Reverse pointed headstock
    - Blood red body, black beveled edges, chrome hardware
    """
    
    # Color palette
    BLOOD_RED = (180, 20, 20)
    DARK_RED = (120, 10, 10)
    BLACK = (20, 20, 20)
    CHROME = (200, 200, 210)
    DARK_CHROME = (140, 140, 150)
    
    # Base position (where guitar body center is)
    bx, by = x, y
    
    if facing_right:
        # === BODY: Sharp V-shape with two distinct horns ===
        # Upper horn - points UP and LEFT (long and sharp)
        upper_horn_tip = (bx - 8, by - 10)
        upper_horn_inner = (bx - 2, by - 4)
        
        # Lower horn - points DOWN and RIGHT (sharp, weapon-like)
        lower_horn_tip = (bx + 6, by + 10)
        lower_horn_inner = (bx + 2, by + 4)
        
        # Waist is pinched between horns
        waist_left = (bx - 4, by)
        waist_right = (bx + 2, by)
        
        # Body outline points (clockwise from upper horn tip)
        body_points = [
            upper_horn_tip,      # Upper horn tip (UP/LEFT)
            (bx - 2, by - 6),    # Upper horn edge
            waist_left,          # Left waist
            (bx - 3, by + 3),    # Lower body left
            (bx + 1, by + 6),    # Lower horn base
            lower_horn_tip,      # Lower horn tip (DOWN/RIGHT)
            (bx + 3, by + 4),    # Lower horn inner
            waist_right,         # Right waist
            (bx + 1, by - 3),    # Upper body right
            (bx - 1, by - 5),    # Upper horn inner
        ]
        
        # Draw main body (blood red)
        draw.polygon(body_points, fill=BLOOD_RED, outline=DARK_RED)
        
        # Black beveled edges (thicker outline on edges)
        draw.line([upper_horn_tip, (bx - 2, by - 6)], fill=BLACK, width=1)
        draw.line([lower_horn_tip, (bx + 1, by + 6)], fill=BLACK, width=1)
        
        # === NECK ===
        # Neck extends from waist area up to headstock
        neck_base = (bx, by - 2)
        neck_top = (bx - 1, by - 14)
        
        # Draw neck (dark wood/black)
        draw.line([neck_base, neck_top], fill=BLACK, width=3)
        
        # Fret markers (dots)
        for fy in range(by - 12, by - 4, 3):
            draw.point((bx - 1, fy), fill=CHROME)
        
        # === HEADSTOCK: Reverse pointed shape ===
        # Sharp V pointing UP when guitar is held
        headstock_points = [
            (bx - 1, by - 14),   # Base of headstock
            (bx - 4, by - 18),   # Left point
            (bx - 1, by - 20),   # Top tip (sharp V pointing up)
            (bx + 2, by - 18),   # Right point
        ]
        draw.polygon(headstock_points, fill=BLOOD_RED, outline=BLACK)
        
        # Tuning pegs (chrome dots)
        draw.ellipse([bx - 4, by - 19, bx - 3, by - 18], fill=CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx + 1, by - 19, bx + 2, by - 18], fill=CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx - 3, by - 17, bx - 2, by - 16], fill=CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx, by - 17, bx + 1, by - 16], fill=CHROME)
        
        # === HARDWARE ===
        
        # 2 Black humbucker pickups
        # Bridge pickup (closer to lower horn)
        draw.rectangle([bx - 1, by + 2, bx + 2, by + 4], fill=BLACK)
        draw.point((bx, by + 3), fill=DARK_CHROME)  # Pole piece
        draw.point((bx + 1, by + 3), fill=DARK_CHROME)
        
        # Neck pickup (closer to neck)
        draw.rectangle([bx - 2, by - 2, bx + 1, by], fill=BLACK)
        draw.point((bx - 1, by - 1), fill=DARK_CHROME)
        draw.point((bx, by - 1), fill=DARK_CHROME)
        
        # 3 Knobs (2 volume, 1 tone) - chrome
        # Positioned in a triangle
        draw.ellipse([bx + 2, by + 1, bx + 4, by + 3], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx + 3, by - 1, bx + 5, by + 1], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx + 2, by - 3, bx + 4, by - 1], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
        
        # Floyd Rose bridge (chrome)
        bridge_points = [
            (bx - 1, by + 5),
            (bx + 2, by + 5),
            (bx + 2, by + 7),
            (bx - 1, by + 7),
        ]
        draw.polygon(bridge_points, fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
        
        # Bridge saddles
        draw.line([(bx, by + 6), (bx + 1, by + 6)], fill=BLACK, width=1)
        
        # Output jack
        draw.ellipse([bx + 3, by + 4, bx + 5, by + 6], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
        
        # Strings (thin lines from bridge to headstock)
        for sx in range(bx, bx + 2):
            draw.line([(sx, by + 6), (sx - 1, by - 14)], fill=CHROME, width=1)
    
    else:
        # Mirror for left-facing
        # === BODY: Sharp V-shape with two distinct horns ===
        upper_horn_tip = (bx + 8, by - 10)
        lower_horn_tip = (bx - 6, by + 10)
        
        body_points = [
            upper_horn_tip,
            (bx + 2, by - 6),
            (bx + 4, by),
            (bx + 3, by + 3),
            (bx - 1, by + 6),
            lower_horn_tip,
            (bx - 3, by + 4),
            (bx - 2, by),
            (bx, by - 3),
            (bx + 1, by - 5),
        ]
        
        draw.polygon(body_points, fill=BLOOD_RED, outline=DARK_RED)
        draw.line([upper_horn_tip, (bx + 2, by - 6)], fill=BLACK, width=1)
        draw.line([lower_horn_tip, (bx - 1, by + 6)], fill=BLACK, width=1)
        
        # Neck
        neck_base = (bx, by - 2)
        neck_top = (bx + 1, by - 14)
        draw.line([neck_base, neck_top], fill=BLACK, width=3)
        
        for fy in range(by - 12, by - 4, 3):
            draw.point((bx + 1, fy), fill=CHROME)
        
        # Headstock
        headstock_points = [
            (bx + 1, by - 14),
            (bx + 4, by - 18),
            (bx + 1, by - 20),
            (bx - 2, by - 18),
        ]
        draw.polygon(headstock_points, fill=BLOOD_RED, outline=BLACK)
        
        draw.ellipse([bx + 2, by - 19, bx + 3, by - 18], fill=CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx - 1, by - 19, bx, by - 18], fill=CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx + 1, by - 17, bx + 2, by - 16], fill=CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx - 2, by - 17, bx - 1, by - 16], fill=CHROME)
        
        # Pickups
        draw.rectangle([bx - 2, by + 2, bx + 1, by + 4], fill=BLACK)
        draw.rectangle([bx - 1, by - 2, bx + 2, by], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Knobs
        draw.ellipse([bx - 4, by + 1, bx - 2, by + 3], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx - 5, by - 1, bx - 3, by + 1], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx - 4, by - 3, bx - 2, by - 1], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
        
        # Bridge
        draw.rectangle([bx - 2, by + 5, bx + 1, by + 7], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
        draw.ellipse([bx - 5, by + 4, bx - 3, by + 6], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
        
        for sx in range(bx - 1, bx + 1):
            draw.line([(sx, by + 6), (sx + 1, by - 14)], fill=CHROME, width=1)


def draw_player_body(draw, x, y, pose="idle"):
    """Draw the player character body (black outfit, featureless head with red eyes)."""
    
    BLACK = (15, 15, 15)
    DARK_GRAY = (40, 40, 40)
    RED_EYE = (220, 30, 30)
    GLOW_RED = (255, 60, 60)
    
    if pose == "idle":
        # Head (featureless, slightly oval)
        draw.ellipse([x - 5, y - 18, x + 5, y - 8], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Red eyes (glowing)
        draw.ellipse([x - 3, y - 14, x - 1, y - 12], fill=RED_EYE, outline=GLOW_RED)
        draw.ellipse([x + 1, y - 14, x + 3, y - 12], fill=RED_EYE, outline=GLOW_RED)
        
        # Body (black outfit)
        draw.rectangle([x - 6, y - 8, x + 6, y + 8], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Legs
        draw.rectangle([x - 5, y + 8, x - 2, y + 16], fill=BLACK)
        draw.rectangle([x + 2, y + 8, x + 5, y + 16], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Arms (holding guitar)
        # Left arm (holding neck)
        draw.line([(x - 5, y - 4), (x - 10, y + 2)], fill=BLACK, width=3)
        # Right arm (strumming position)
        draw.line([(x + 5, y - 4), (x + 10, y + 4)], fill=BLACK, width=3)
        
    elif pose == "attack":
        # Head tilted back (metal pose)
        draw.ellipse([x - 4, y - 20, x + 6, y - 10], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Red eyes (intense)
        draw.ellipse([x - 1, y - 17, x + 1, y - 15], fill=RED_EYE, outline=GLOW_RED)
        draw.ellipse([x + 3, y - 16, x + 5, y - 14], fill=RED_EYE, outline=GLOW_RED)
        
        # Body leaning forward
        draw.polygon([(x - 4, y - 8), (x + 8, y - 6), (x + 6, y + 8), (x - 6, y + 6)], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Legs (power stance)
        draw.rectangle([x - 6, y + 6, x - 2, y + 18], fill=BLACK)
        draw.rectangle([x + 3, y + 6, x + 8, y + 16], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Arms (guitar raised for attack)
        draw.line([(x - 4, y - 6), (x - 12, y - 8)], fill=BLACK, width=3)
        draw.line([(x + 6, y - 4), (x + 14, y + 2)], fill=BLACK, width=3)
        
    elif pose == "walk1":
        # Head
        draw.ellipse([x - 5, y - 18, x + 5, y - 8], fill=BLACK)
        draw.ellipse([x - 3, y - 14, x - 1, y - 12], fill=RED_EYE, outline=GLOW_RED)
        draw.ellipse([x + 1, y - 14, x + 3, y - 12], fill=RED_EYE, outline=GLOW_RED)
        
        # Body
        draw.rectangle([x - 6, y - 8, x + 6, y + 6], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Legs (walking)
        draw.rectangle([x - 6, y + 6, x - 3, y + 14], fill=BLACK)  # Back leg
        draw.rectangle([x + 2, y + 6, x + 6, y + 18], fill=BLACK)  # Front leg
        
        # Arms
        draw.line([(x - 5, y - 4), (x - 10, y + 1)], fill=BLACK, width=3)
        draw.line([(x + 5, y - 4), (x + 9, y + 3)], fill=BLACK, width=3)
        
    elif pose == "walk2":
        # Head
        draw.ellipse([x - 5, y - 18, x + 5, y - 8], fill=BLACK)
        draw.ellipse([x - 3, y - 14, x - 1, y - 12], fill=RED_EYE, outline=GLOW_RED)
        draw.ellipse([x + 1, y - 14, x + 3, y - 12], fill=RED_EYE, outline=GLOW_RED)
        
        # Body
        draw.rectangle([x - 6, y - 8, x + 6, y + 6], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Legs (walking - opposite)
        draw.rectangle([x - 5, y + 6, x + 1, y + 18], fill=BLACK)  # Front leg
        draw.rectangle([x + 3, y + 6, x + 6, y + 14], fill=BLACK)  # Back leg
        
        # Arms
        draw.line([(x - 5, y - 4), (x - 9, y + 2)], fill=BLACK, width=3)
        draw.line([(x + 5, y - 4), (x + 10, y + 0)], fill=BLACK, width=3)


def create_sprite(pose="idle", size=48):
    """Create a single player sprite with BC Rich Warlock guitar."""
    
    img = Image.new('RGBA', (size, size), (0, 0, 0, 0))
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
    
    center_x = size // 2
    center_y = size // 2 + 4
    
    # Draw guitar first (behind body parts that should be in front)
    if pose == "idle":
        # Guitar positioned to the right, slightly angled
        create_warlock_guitar(draw, center_x + 6, center_y - 2, facing_right=True)
        draw_player_body(draw, center_x, center_y, pose)
        
    elif pose == "attack":
        # Guitar raised high for attack
        create_warlock_guitar(draw, center_x + 10, center_y - 6, facing_right=True)
        draw_player_body(draw, center_x, center_y, pose)
        
    elif pose == "walk1":
        create_warlock_guitar(draw, center_x + 5, center_y - 2, facing_right=True)
        draw_player_body(draw, center_x, center_y, pose)
        
    elif pose == "walk2":
        create_warlock_guitar(draw, center_x + 5, center_y - 2, facing_right=True)
        draw_player_body(draw, center_x, center_y, pose)
    
    return img


def create_preview():
    """Create a preview image showing all sprites."""
    
    poses = ["idle", "walk1", "walk2", "attack"]
    sprite_size = 48
    padding = 16
    
    # Calculate grid layout
    cols = 4
    rows = 1
    
    width = cols * (sprite_size + padding) + padding
    height = rows * (sprite_size + padding) + padding + 40  # Extra for labels
    
    preview = Image.new('RGBA', (width, height), (30, 30, 40, 255))
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(preview)
    
    # Draw title
    # (No text method available in basic ImageDraw, so we'll skip text)
    
    for i, pose in enumerate(poses):
        col = i % cols
        row = i // cols
        
        x = padding + col * (sprite_size + padding)
        y = padding + row * (sprite_size + padding) + 20
        
        # Draw sprite
        sprite = create_sprite(pose, sprite_size)
        preview.paste(sprite, (x, y), sprite)
        
        # Draw border around each sprite
        draw.rectangle([x - 2, y - 2, x + sprite_size + 2, y + sprite_size + 2], 
                      outline=(100, 100, 120), width=1)
    
    return preview


def main():
    """Generate all player sprites."""
    
    print("Creating BC Rich Warlock player sprites...")
    
    # Create individual sprites
    poses = {
        "idle": "player_idle.png",
        "attack": "player_attack.png",
        "walk1": "player_walk1.png",
        "walk2": "player_walk2.png",
    }
    
    for pose, filename in poses.items():
        print(f"  Creating {filename}...")
        sprite = create_sprite(pose, size=48)
        sprite.save(f"/home/computron/heavy_metal_nightmare/{filename}")
    
    # Create preview
    print("  Creating player_sprites_preview.png...")
    preview = create_preview()
    preview.save("/home/computron/heavy_metal_nightmare/player_sprites_preview.png")
    
    print("Done! All sprites created successfully.")
    print("\nFeatures:")
    print("  - Sharp V-shaped Warlock body with two distinct horns")
    print("  - Upper horn points UP and LEFT")
    print("  - Lower horn points DOWN and RIGHT")
    print("  - Pinched waist between horns")
    print("  - Reverse pointed headstock")
    print("  - Blood red body with black beveled edges")
    print("  - Chrome hardware (2 humbuckers, 3 knobs, Floyd Rose bridge)")
    print("  - Clean edges, no artifacts")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

        sy = 1 if y1 < y2 else -1
        err = dx - dy

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Create clean BC Rich Warlock player sprites.
Pixel-perfect approach with unmistakable Warlock features.
"""

from PIL import Image, ImageDraw

def create_warlock_sprite(pose="idle"):
    """Create a 48x48 sprite with clear Warlock guitar."""
    
    img = Image.new('RGBA', (48, 48), (0, 0, 0, 0))
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
    
    # Colors
    BLACK = (8, 8, 8)
    RED_EYE = (255, 50, 50)
    BLOOD_RED = (200, 25, 25)
    DARK_RED = (130, 15, 15)
    CHROME = (230, 230, 240)
    DARK_CHROME = (170, 170, 180)
    
    cx, cy = 24, 26  # Character center
    
    # === DRAW WARLOCK GUITAR FIRST ===
    # Position guitar prominently to the right
    gx = cx + 6
    gy = cy
    
    # WARLOCK BODY - Sharp V with two distinct horns
    # Using polygon for clean shape
    
    # Upper horn points UP and LEFT (long)
    # Lower horn points DOWN and RIGHT (sharp)
    
    body_points = [
        (gx - 11, gy - 9),   # Upper horn tip
        (gx - 7, gy - 6),    # Upper horn edge
        (gx - 4, gy - 3),    # Upper body
        (gx - 2, gy),        # Waist left
        (gx - 3, gy + 4),    # Lower body left
        (gx + 1, gy + 8),    # Lower horn base
        (gx + 9, gy + 13),   # Lower horn tip (DOWN/RIGHT)
        (gx + 5, gy + 7),    # Lower horn inner
        (gx + 3, gy + 2),    # Waist right
        (gx + 1, gy - 3),    # Upper body right
        (gx - 8, gy - 7),    # Upper horn inner
    ]
    
    # Fill body
    draw.polygon(body_points, fill=BLOOD_RED)
    
    # Black outline (beveled edges)
    draw.polygon(body_points, outline=BLACK)
    
    # Inner bevel lines
    draw.line([(gx - 9, gy - 7), (gx - 5, gy - 4)], fill=BLACK, width=1)
    draw.line([(gx + 7, gy + 10), (gx + 4, gy + 6)], fill=BLACK, width=1)
    
    # NECK - Long, extends up and left
    neck_rect = [gx - 3, gy - 22, gx + 1, gy - 2]
    draw.rectangle(neck_rect, fill=BLACK)
    
    # Fret markers
    for fy in range(gy - 20, gy - 4, 3):
        draw.point((gx - 1, fy), fill=CHROME)
    
    # HEADSTOCK - Reverse pointed (Warlock signature)
    headstock_points = [
        (gx - 3, gy - 22),   # Base left
        (gx - 8, gy - 28),   # Left point
        (gx - 4, gy - 34),   # Top tip (sharp V up)
        (gx, gy - 28),       # Right point
        (gx + 1, gy - 22),   # Base right
    ]
    draw.polygon(headstock_points, fill=BLOOD_RED, outline=BLACK)
    
    # Tuning pegs
    draw.ellipse([gx - 8, gy - 30, gx - 6, gy - 28], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    draw.ellipse([gx, gy - 30, gx + 2, gy - 28], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    draw.ellipse([gx - 7, gy - 26, gx - 5, gy - 24], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    draw.ellipse([gx - 1, gy - 26, gx + 1, gy - 24], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    
    # HARDWARE
    
    # 2 Black humbucker pickups
    # Bridge pickup
    draw.rectangle([gx - 1, gy + 5, gx + 4, gy + 9], fill=BLACK, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    draw.line([(gx, gy + 6), (gx + 3, gy + 6)], fill=DARK_CHROME, width=1)
    draw.line([(gx, gy + 8), (gx + 3, gy + 8)], fill=DARK_CHROME, width=1)
    
    # Neck pickup
    draw.rectangle([gx - 3, gy, gx + 2, gy + 4], fill=BLACK, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    draw.line([(gx - 2, gy + 1), (gx + 1, gy + 1)], fill=DARK_CHROME, width=1)
    draw.line([(gx - 2, gy + 3), (gx + 1, gy + 3)], fill=DARK_CHROME, width=1)
    
    # 3 Control knobs (chrome)
    draw.ellipse([gx + 3, gy + 2, gx + 7, gy + 6], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    draw.ellipse([gx + 4, gy - 2, gx + 8, gy + 2], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    draw.ellipse([gx + 3, gy - 6, gx + 7, gy - 2], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    
    # Floyd Rose bridge
    draw.rectangle([gx - 2, gy + 10, gx + 3, gy + 14], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    draw.line([(gx - 1, gy + 11), (gx + 2, gy + 11)], fill=BLACK, width=1)
    draw.line([(gx - 1, gy + 13), (gx + 2, gy + 13)], fill=BLACK, width=1)
    
    # Output jack
    draw.ellipse([gx + 6, gy + 8, gx + 10, gy + 12], fill=CHROME, outline=DARK_CHROME)
    
    # Strings
    for sx in [gx - 1, gx, gx + 1]:
        draw.line([(sx, gy + 11), (sx - 1, gy - 22)], fill=CHROME, width=1)
    
    # === DRAW PLAYER CHARACTER ===
    
    if pose == "idle":
        # Head (featureless black)
        draw.ellipse([cx - 6, cy - 22, cx + 6, cy - 10], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Red eyes
        draw.ellipse([cx - 4, cy - 18, cx - 1, cy - 15], fill=RED_EYE)
        draw.ellipse([cx + 1, cy - 18, cx + 4, cy - 15], fill=RED_EYE)
        
        # Body
        draw.rectangle([cx - 7, cy - 10, cx + 7, cy + 8], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Legs
        draw.rectangle([cx - 6, cy + 8, cx - 2, cy + 20], fill=BLACK)
        draw.rectangle([cx + 2, cy + 8, cx + 6, cy + 20], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Arms
        draw.line([(cx - 6, cy - 6), (cx - 13, cy + 2)], fill=BLACK, width=4)
        draw.line([(cx + 6, cy - 6), (cx + 13, cy + 4)], fill=BLACK, width=4)
        
    elif pose == "attack":
        # Guitar position (raised)
        # (Already drawn above, but character pose changes)
        
        # Head tilted
        draw.ellipse([cx - 5, cy - 24, cx + 7, cy - 12], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Eyes
        draw.ellipse([cx - 2, cy - 20, cx + 1, cy - 17], fill=RED_EYE)
        draw.ellipse([cx + 3, cy - 19, cx + 6, cy - 16], fill=RED_EYE)
        
        # Body
        draw.polygon([(cx - 5, cy - 10), (cx + 9, cy - 8), (cx + 7, cy + 8), (cx - 7, cy + 6)], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Legs
        draw.rectangle([cx - 7, cy + 6, cx - 2, cy + 22], fill=BLACK)
        draw.rectangle([cx + 3, cy + 6, cx + 9, cy + 16], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Arms (guitar raised)
        draw.line([(cx - 5, cy - 8), (cx - 16, cy - 10)], fill=BLACK, width=4)
        draw.line([(cx + 7, cy - 6), (cx + 16, cy + 2)], fill=BLACK, width=4)
        
    elif pose == "walk1":
        draw.ellipse([cx - 6, cy - 22, cx + 6, cy - 10], fill=BLACK)
        draw.ellipse([cx - 4, cy - 18, cx - 1, cy - 15], fill=RED_EYE)
        draw.ellipse([cx + 1, cy - 18, cx + 4, cy - 15], fill=RED_EYE)
        
        draw.rectangle([cx - 7, cy - 10, cx + 7, cy + 6], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Walking legs
        draw.rectangle([cx - 7, cy + 6, cx - 3, cy + 18], fill=BLACK)
        draw.rectangle([cx + 2, cy + 6, cx + 7, cy + 22], fill=BLACK)
        
        draw.line([(cx - 6, cy - 6), (cx - 12, cy + 1)], fill=BLACK, width=4)
        draw.line([(cx + 6, cy - 6), (cx + 12, cy + 3)], fill=BLACK, width=4)
        
    elif pose == "walk2":
        draw.ellipse([cx - 6, cy - 22, cx + 6, cy - 10], fill=BLACK)
        draw.ellipse([cx - 4, cy - 18, cx - 1, cy - 15], fill=RED_EYE)
        draw.ellipse([cx + 1, cy - 18, cx + 4, cy - 15], fill=RED_EYE)
        
        draw.rectangle([cx - 7, cy - 10, cx + 7, cy + 6], fill=BLACK)
        
        # Opposite legs
        draw.rectangle([cx - 6, cy + 6, cx + 1, cy + 22], fill=BLACK)
        draw.rectangle([cx + 3, cy + 6, cx + 7, cy + 18], fill=BLACK)
        
        draw.line([(cx - 6, cy - 6), (cx - 11, cy + 2)], fill=BLACK, width=4)
        draw.line([(cx + 6, cy - 6), (cx + 12, cy + 0)], fill=BLACK, width=4)
    
    return img


def create_preview():
    """Create preview sheet."""
    poses = ["idle", "walk1", "walk2", "attack"]
    padding = 24
    
    preview = Image.new('RGBA', (4 * 48 + 5 * padding, 48 + 2 * padding + 40), (20, 20, 30, 255))
    
    for i, pose in enumerate(poses):
        sprite = create_warlock_sprite(pose)
        x = padding + i * (48 + padding)
        y = padding + 20
        preview.paste(sprite, (x, y), sprite)
        
        # Border
        draw = ImageDraw.Draw(preview)
        draw.rectangle([x - 2, y - 2, x + 50, y + 50], outline=(100, 100, 120), width=2)
    
    return preview


def main():
    print("=" * 60)
    print("BC RICH WARLOCK PLAYER SPRITES - CLEAN VERSION")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    poses = {
        "idle": "player_idle.png",
        "attack": "player_attack.png",
        "walk1": "player_walk1.png",
        "walk2": "player_walk2.png",
    }
    
    for pose, filename in poses.items():
        print(f"Creating {filename}...")
        sprite = create_warlock_sprite(pose)
        sprite.save(f"/home/computron/heavy_metal_nightmare/{filename}")
    
    print("Creating player_sprites_preview.png...")
    preview = create_preview()
    preview.save("/home/computron/heavy_metal_nightmare/player_sprites_preview.png")
    
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("ALL SPRITES CREATED!")
    print("=" * 60)
    print("\nWarlock Features:")
    print("  • Sharp V-shaped body")
    print("  • Two distinct pointy horns")
    print("  • Upper horn: UP and LEFT")
    print("  • Lower horn: DOWN and RIGHT")
    print("  • Pinched waist")
    print("  • Reverse pointed headstock")
    print("  • Blood red body, black edges")
    print("  • 2 humbuckers, 3 knobs, Floyd Rose")
    print("  • NO artifacts - clean transparent background")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    img = Image.new('RGBA', (48, 48), (0, 0, 0, 0))
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
    
    cx, cy = 24, 26
    
    # Character (black)
    draw.ellipse([cx-6, cy-20, cx+6, cy-10], fill=(10, 10, 10))  # Head
    draw.rectangle([cx-6, cy-10, cx+6, cy+10], fill=(10, 10, 10))  # Body
    
    # Red eyes
    draw.ellipse([cx-4, cy-16, cx-1, cy-13], fill=(255, 40, 40))
    draw.ellipse([cx+1, cy-16, cx+4, cy-13], fill=(255, 40, 40))
    
    # Warlock guitar (prominent, to the right)
    gx, gy = cx + 10, cy
    
    # V-body shape
    guitar_body = [
        (gx-10, gy-8),   # Upper horn
        (gx-5, gy-3),    # Upper edge
        (gx-2, gy),      # Waist
        (gx+2, gy+5),    # Lower edge
        (gx+8, gy+12),   # Lower horn
        (gx+4, gy+6),    # Inner
        (gx, gy+2),      # Inner waist
        (gx-6, gy-4),    # Inner
    ]
    draw.polygon(guitar_body, fill=(200, 30, 30), outline=(10, 10, 10))
    
    # Neck
    draw.rectangle([gx-3, gy-20, gx, gy-2], fill=(10, 10, 10))
    
    # Headstock (pointed V)
    headstock = [(gx-3, gy-20), (gx-6, gy-26), (gx-2, gy-24), (gx, gy-20)]
    draw.polygon(headstock, fill=(200, 30, 30), outline=(10, 10, 10))
    
    # Hardware
    draw.rectangle([gx-2, gy+3, gx+3, gy+6], fill=(10, 10, 10))  # Pickup
    draw.ellipse([gx+3, gy, gx+6, gy+3], fill=(220, 220, 230))    # Knob
    
    img.save(filename)
    print(f"Saved {filename}")
